name: Constance alligator handbag
description:
Highly valuable exotic Hermès collector's item

Rare Hermès Constance 18 Mini bag in glossy Mississippi alligator leather, in a rich dark chocolate hue.

This highly sought-after mini size is adorned with elegant palladium hardware, creating a refined contrast between the coolness of silver and the warm depth of the exotic leather. The glossy finish of the smooth alligator highlights the beautifully structured and symmetrical scales, giving the bag a sophisticated and timeless appeal.

Model: Hermès Constance 18 Mini

Material: Glossy Mississippi alligator leather (Smooth)

Color: Chocolate/Dark Brown

Closures: Palladium (PHW - Silver)

Dimensions: 18 cm

Comes with its original Hermès dust bag.

The square symbol (•) next to the "Hermès Paris" inscription confirms the use of genuine Mississippi alligator leather. A dry asterisk (*) hallmark is present near the main hallmark; this type of marking is generally considered an internal identifier for the craftsman or workshop.

Condition: Very good. The leather is in excellent condition, with no visible scratches. The H-shaped clasp shows superficial scratches from normal use. The interior is like new, exceptionally clean, and superbly preserved.
